summary: GTM Engine - unified GTM flow (three triggers): webhook visitor | 8am cron cold lead gen (Exa, Apify, missed-webhook) | 20-min Unipile LinkedIn-engagement poll; all converge at enrich -> score -> personalize -> Instantly send -> CRM

icp_query.description: Exa ICP search query for intake
icp_query.default: Series A to C B2B SaaS companies, 50-500 employees, recently funded or hiring

event.description: Webhook trigger: raw inbound visitor event payload (absent on the 8am cron run)

mode.description: Poll mode: unipile_engagement | funding_poll (else 8am cold gen)

funding_event.description: Funding webhook trigger: normalized funding event {company,domain,amount_eur,round,announced_at,investors,country}

funding_lookback_days.description: Days to look back for funding rounds (funding_poll mode)

value.content:
#requirements:
#httpx
#anthropic
#sendgrid
#certifi
from scripts.email import postmaster

def main(event: dict = None):
    # Webhook (one inbound visitor): read the CACHED reputation verdict - a
    # live pull + Slack alert per event would be heavy and noisy. Scheduled
    # 8am batch: pull fresh and flag failing domains before any send rides on it.
    return postmaster.latest_verdict() if event else postmaster.main()

modules.summary: Postmaster - batch: pull reputation FIRST + flag failing domains; webhook: cached verdict

branches.summary: Funding webhook trigger - one funding event straight to enrich (realtime)

value.content:
#requirements:
#httpx
# Map a single funding webhook event to [lead] using the same
# field mapping as intake/funding.py. realtime_funding.py is the
# standalone single-process entry; this branch feeds the shared flow.
from scripts.intake.funding import main as run_batch
from datetime import date

def main(funding_event: dict = None):
    if not funding_event:
        return []
    # Normalize to the same shape as funding.recent_rounds() then reuse batch mapper
    normalized = {
        'company': funding_event.get('company'),
        'domain': funding_event.get('domain'),
        'amount_eur': funding_event.get('amount_eur') or funding_event.get('funding_amount_eur'),
        'round': funding_event.get('round') or funding_event.get('funding_round'),
        'announced_at': funding_event.get('announced_at') or funding_event.get('funding_announced_at'),
        'investors': funding_event.get('investors', []),
        'country': funding_event.get('country'),
    }
    # Patch funding module to return our single record
    import scripts.common.funding as _f
    _orig = _f.recent_rounds
    _f.recent_rounds = lambda **kw: [normalized]
    try:
        return run_batch(since_days=1, limit=1)
    finally:
        _f.recent_rounds = _orig

modules.summary: Funding webhook - map one funding event to [lead]

branches.summary: Funding poll - near-realtime batch from funding feed (every 30min)

#requirements:
#httpx
from scripts.intake import website_visitors, linkedin_visitors

def main(limit: int = 100):
    # 'Missed-webhook' backfill: drain any visitor events the real-time
    # webhook did not catch (source down, retry, etc.).
    return website_visitors.main(limit) + linkedin_visitors.main(limit)

modules.summary: Missed-webhook - drain website + LinkedIn visitor tables

value.content:
#requirements:
#httpx
from scripts.crm.lifecycle import main as run

def main(event: dict = None, mode: str = None):
    # Follow-up re-injection is a batch (8am) concern. The real-time entries —
    # the webhook visitor (event) and the Unipile engagement poll (mode) — must
    # not drag the whole follow-up queue into their send.
    return [] if (event or mode) else run()

modules.summary: Lifecycle - batch only: load follow-up-due leads (webhook + poll skip)

value.content:
#requirements:
#httpx
#anthropic
#sendgrid
#certifi
from scripts.report.daily_summary import main as run

def main(leads: list = None):
    leads = leads or []
    found = len(leads)
    enriched = sum(1 for l in leads if l.get('email') or l.get('signal') or l.get('company_size'))
    sent = sum(1 for l in leads if l.get('stage') == 'contacted')
    queued = sum(1 for l in leads if l.get('stage') == 'warm')
    return run(found=found, enriched=enriched, sent=sent, queued=queued)

triggers._comment: Four triggers, ONE flow. The `intake` branchone routes on flow_input: funding_event -> funding webhook; mode=funding_poll -> funding poll; event -> visitor webhook; default -> 8am cold gen (Exa+Apify+funding feed+missed-webhook). All converge at enrich_parallel.

schedule_8am.routes_to: cold lead generation (funding PRIMARY + Exa/Apify backfill + missed-webhook drain)

webhook.note: Windmill auto-exposes this flow at its run webhook URL; point the visitor source (RB2B / LinkedIn) at it, or attach an HTTP-route trigger.

webhook_funding.note: Point a funding-feed webhook or Zapier at the run URL with funding_event payload. Routes to intake_funding_webhook branch -> straight to enrich. realtime_funding.py is the standalone single-process alternative.
webhook_funding.routes_to: funding webhook branch (one funding event, real-time)
